creator: nagy.attila@gmail.com
text:
Hi,

A lot of people have asked for an upgrade, and the original bug report 
is 20 days old now.
Are there any problems with it? Anything I can do?

Sorry for the noise, but sending the link at least twice a day to 
various people is just getting boring. :)

Thanks,

On 03/19/2012 08:19 AM, Attila Nagy wrote:
> Hi,
>
> Attached are the complete port files for dovecot2 and 
> dovecot2-pigeonhole, also updated the former to 2.1.3 (portrevision is 
> not touched because the ports are not yet committed).
>
> On 03/09/12 16:30, FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org wrote:
>> Thank you very much for your problem report.
>> It has the internal identification `ports/165882'.
>> The individual assigned to look at your
>> report is: freebsd-ports-bugs.
>>
>> You can access the state of your problem report at any time
>> via this link:
>>
>> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=165882
>>
>>> Category:       ports
>>> Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
>>> Synopsis:       maintainer update: mail/dovecot2 and 
>>> dovecot2-pigeonhole
>>> Arrival-Date:   Fri Mar 09 15:30:11 UTC 2012
>
